vocab.meaning: một luồng gió mới (ai đó/điều gì đó mới mẻ, thú vị)
vocab.example: Conversing with a stranger who has a completely different worldview can be a real breath of fresh air.

vocab.meaning: tâm đầu ý hợp ngay từ lần đầu gặp mặt
vocab.example: I once met a fellow traveler at a train station and we hit it off immediately, talking for hours until our ride arrived.

vocab.meaning: phá tan bầu không khí ngượng ngùng
vocab.example: I usually try to break the ice by making a lighthearted comment about the weather or the surroundings.

vocab.word: ship that pass in the night
vocab.meaning: những người gặp nhau tình cờ rồi lướt qua đời nhau mãi mãi
vocab.example: Most people you talk to in public are just ships that pass in the night, but those brief moments can still be meaningful.

vocab.meaning: lạc đề, mải mê nói về một chuyện không liên quan
vocab.example: I started asking a stranger for directions, but we ended up going off on a tangent about the best local coffee shops.

vocab.meaning: có tài ăn nói, khéo léo trong giao tiếp
vocab.example: My sister has a real gift for gab; she can start a deep conversation with literally anyone in a grocery store line.

vocab.word: on the spur of the moment
vocab.meaning: bất chợt, không hề có kế hoạch trước
vocab.example: I decided to talk to the person next to me at the gallery on the spur of the moment because they looked as confused as I was.

vocab.meaning: cuộc trò chuyện xã giao, tán gẫu về những chuyện vụn vặt
vocab.example: I’m quite adept at small talk, which makes it easy to engage with strangers without feeling awkward.

vocab.meaning: thấu hiểu tâm tư, cảm xúc của ai đó một cách dễ dàng
vocab.example: Sometimes you meet a stranger whose expressions are so vivid you can read them like a book, making it easier to start a chat.

vocab.meaning: giữ khoảng cách, không muốn thân mật quá mức
vocab.example: While I enjoy brief chats, I tend to keep strangers at arm's length to protect my personal privacy in public.
